Created attachment 201091
poudriere testport log

Update from 0.13 to 0.15.
Portlint says gettext should be added but I think not needed for python.
LXML removed since no longer used.
griffith is no longer maintained by the original developers.
However there is a newer version on gitlab which has been ported to python3/gtk3.
